candidate_findings.claim: Rawn's plan to meet the warden before the morning session does not progress as expected due to an unexplained schedule change.

evidence_spans.span_text: Rawn told her he would go to the warden himself before the morning session.
He said the warden had sent word at first light that the schedule had changed.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The change in schedule may be part of a larger narrative strategy not visible within these scenes.
candidate_findings.review_note: Verify if any preceding events or discussions provide context for the warden's sudden schedule change.

overall_run_note: Found one progression_break due to an unexplained change in the meeting schedule between scenes.
